pages.title: Goshinboku
pages.text: Have your heart block surrounded by a minimum radius 7 circle of connected logs that reaches at least twenty-five blocks tall.$(br)$(br)You are allowed gaps for doors, windows, etc.

pages.title: Reward
pages.text: Gain a Cherry Sapling, a Yellow Sakura Sapling, and a White Sakura Sapling. They count as descendants of your heart log. You still cannot absorb other trees. (Craft them into planks to avoid accidental placement).
